greenTech.title: Omnibus XII — digital EPREL & labelling (24 Jun)
greenTech.summary: Energy Omnibus XII embeds digital EPREL and labelling simplification — engineering teams should map product-registry and QR compliance before Q3.
impact: Retailer and manufacturer product pages need registry-aligned data
Equipment buyers get clearer labels when comparing efficient models

greenTech.title: QR & product-registry engineering for retailers
greenTech.summary: June New in Tech tracks QR and product-registry engineering as Omnibus XII moves from consultation to legislative text.
impact: Ops teams need registry metadata alongside EPREL updates
Monitoring and IoT dashboards benefit from consistent product IDs

greenTech.title: Sustainable computing benchmarks — H2 RFP season
greenTech.summary: H2 2026 RFP season for EU ICT energy efficiency and sustainable-computing benchmarks — data-centre and building IoT teams should watch CORDIS calls.
impact: Funding window for monitoring and efficiency pilots
Signals which efficiency metrics regulators will benchmark next
